message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Adding error_threshold param to Image.quantize(); need to edit Image.py quantize method and its tests. Let me know your feature/files so we can split Image.py by function if needed.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: My feature: add sort_palette param to Image.quantize() for post-quantization palette sorting (brightness/rgb). I'll own Image.py and its quantize test file. What files do you need?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Our features both touch quantize() in the same two files and can't be made disjoint. Since we're each working in our own sandbox/repo copy, I'll implement error_threshold in my copy of Image.py (adding a new optional kwarg after existing quantize params, calling im.quantize as needed, with docstring addition) without removing/renaming any existing params so a later merge of both diffs should apply cleanly. Proceeding to implement now.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: We can't be disjoint at file level - both touch quantize() signature/tests. Proposal: I go first since I already have PROPOSE in flight. I'll implement sort_palette param, verify tests pass, then run 'git commit' to checkpoint my change (so it's out of the uncommitted diff). I'll message DONE when committed. Please hold off editing Image.py/test_image_quantize.py until then - after my commit, your 'git diff' against HEAD will show ONLY your error_threshold changes, keeping our patch.txt files clean of each other's work. Sound good?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Good point re: separate sandboxes - that resolves the clobbering concern entirely. Proceeding to implement sort_palette now. Will keep param additive/non-breaking to existing quantize() signature.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Sounds good - you go first. I'll hold off editing Image.py and test_image_quantize.py until I receive your DONE (post-commit). Ping me when ready.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Implemented error_threshold param (new _quantize_to_error_threshold helper, additive kwarg appended after dither) and added test_quantize_error_threshold. Existing tests pass. Wrapping up now.
